
# Task Eight

## Intended Learning Outcomes

* Showcase a simple machine learning project


## Analysis

- Set up a Github repository in your own profile

- Organise a clear repository

- Analyse the data

- Write a clear README

- Include a text file with a clear documentation of the questions set in the supervised learning regression chapter

## Results

- You will have a simple machine learning project you can share and discuss with others

- It must be well documented and easy to follow

- Work with your classmates to discuss questions and enhance answers
